name: SankeyChart
searchText: sankeychart sankey diagram component @mantine/charts /charts/sankey-chart children colors data height iterations linkcolor linkcurvature linkopacity nodecolor nodepadding nodewidth sankeyprops textcolor tooltipanimationduration tooltipprops valueformatter withtooltip

props.name: colors
props.description: An array of colors used for nodes when no color is set on individual nodes

props.name: data
props.description: Data used to render chart, must include nodes and links arrays

props.name: linkColor
props.description: Default color for links, by default depends on color scheme

props.name: linkCurvature
props.description: The curvature of links between nodes

props.name: nodeColor
props.description: Default color for nodes, by default depends on color scheme

props.name: sankeyProps
props.description: Props passed down to recharts Sankey component

props.name: tooltipProps
props.description: Props passed down to Tooltip recharts component

props.name: valueFormatter
props.description: A function to format values inside the tooltip and node labels

props.name: withTooltip
props.description: Determines whether the tooltip should be displayed when hovered
